source: user request 2026-05-08 — explicit 'log everything' rule, both modes
title: Confirm L1 auto-log fires in normie mode (originally suspected gap)
what_failed: Initial audit suggested normie mode might not log to L1 raw_wiki, leaving ~50% of conversations off the cloud archive.
where_failed: Suspicion: pi_agent._respond_normie had no log_turn call.
why_likely: T-024 was titled 'L1 auto-logging per conversation turn' and the ticket focused on root mode — normie path could plausibly have been missed.
suggested_fix: If the gap is real, mirror the root-mode log_turn call in normie. Otherwise add a regression test asserting both paths log.
fix_applied: Audit confirmed _respond_normie ALREADY calls memory.log_turn at lines 628 (shortcut path) and 702 (Groq path). T-024 covered both modes correctly. No code change needed; closing as verified. Indirect coverage via testing/test_turn_log.py (universal wrapper) ensures any future return path is covered.
tests: testing/test_turn_log.py::TestProcessInputWrapper covers all return paths via wrapper.
